meta.title: Core Control Unit — Engineering & Digital Solutions
meta.description: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company specialising in system architecture and custom digital solutions.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: Complete engineering solutions for your most demanding digital projects.

items.title: System Architecture
items.description: Design of robust and scalable software infrastructures. Microservices, modular monoliths, distributed systems.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: High-performance web applications with modern technologies. React, Next.js, REST and GraphQL APIs.

items.title: Back-end Engineering
items.description: Critical business services in Rust, Node.js or Python. Performance optimisation, security and resilience.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Codebase audit, stack selection, architecture review. Supporting product and technical teams.

items.title: Integration & DevOps
items.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker/Kubernetes containerisation, cloud deployment and application monitoring.

items.title: Custom Solutions
items.description: Development of business tools, automations, parsers, embedded systems and specialised CLIs.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company built on a simple principle: deliver code that works, holds up, and adapts.
about.p2: We work on complex projects — system architectures, critical applications, business tools — maintaining a senior approach with no unnecessary overhead.
about.p3: Based in France, we work remotely with European and international teams, on a project basis or as reinforcement for existing teams.

contact.heading: Start a project
contact.subtitle: Describe your project. We respond within 48h.
contact.placeholderProject: Describe your project, your current stack, your constraints...
